text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text: (…Heart-san.)

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
『Hey, little bird, 
What's got you down?』

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
『Those blue, blue days 
Are when the sun comes out.』

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
『So lift those wings and take to flight 
'Cause blue skies are all right.』

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
When I find myself in the center of a cold and violent storm, that's 
when I remember the warmth of the sun. So long as I keep that in my 
heart, I can face the future, and keep moving forward.

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
I'm Daring Heart. 
The unbreakable Umamusume with the heart of a queen!

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
(Heart-san… To me, you are, and have always been… 
A bright light shining proudly, even in the darkest of nights.)

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text: (And that's why…!!)

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text: Let me say it one more time——congrats! That was an incredible win. Looks like it's you and me, my sweet, little date♪

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
Yes…! Thank you ever so much, Heart-san. 
And… I have something to say about our roles.

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text: Hm? Oh, as in who'll lead and who'll follow? Plenty of pairs don't worry about splitting roles up too strictly… But do you want to?

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
I do. And… I would like you to allow me to take the lead. 
In dance, the follow is the flower, the star of the show. 
And it would be my role as the lead to support you.

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
When the day comes, I swear to you, I will help you bloom 
more bold and beautiful than any other. 
——So, please.

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text: …Tact. You——

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
Heart-san. 
Will you do the honor of taking my hand?

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
……… 
——All right.

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text: Okay! First things first, let's get to practice!

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text: One, two, three, four, five, six, seven…… eight!

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
………!! 
Um, Heart-san! I think that was…!

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text: Pretty good! We're almost there ♪ We should check the video to make sure. Mind if we look, Bouquet?

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much for agreeing to film us, Bouquet-san. I know you have 
much more work to do… I do apologize for making you help us…

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
It's quite all right. I'm here to help because I want to. 
If there is anything else you need, do not hesitate to let me 
know.

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
Woah… The two of them are really heating things up! 
We'd better not fall behind!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Indeed! So let's get right to practice! 
Please—— Give me your hand!

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
And then… pose! …Okay! 
I feel like we're pretty much back in the groove♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I do too! Our dancing is already so perfect you could put us in a 
textbook! And of course it is, because it's us! AHAHAHAAA!!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
——But you and I both know this isn't good enough for us. 
Isn't that right, Flight-san?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Now!! Let's you and I have a talk about how we can make our 
dancing even greater!

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
! Even greater… Do—— 
Do you want to change the choreography?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Of course! After all, we've already done this choreography 
before! Which means it's all behind us now!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
But the two of us never looked behind us on the race track! 
We only ever run forward. Faster and faster! Further and further!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: What I want to say is————

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: We should race!!

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text: ……Huh? ……We are talking about the dance, right?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! We'll be dancing! But we'll be racing, too! 
Because that's what makes you and me… Us!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Speed! Speed!! 
The world we shared has always been about speed!!

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text: …Bakushin O-chan…

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
Haha. Ahahaha! You're right! I love that idea! 
Okay, we'll race. 
——And we'll give it all we've got!

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
We've got a lot to discuss…! 
What song should we dance to? And if we want to express our 
speed, we'll need to cover a decent amount of space…

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me. 
If I may be so bold, please, allow me to help.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
You will be limited by the size of the venue, of course… 
But I will do everything in my power to make your idea a reality.

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
You'd do that for us? Thank you so much, Bouquet-chan! 
…All right, Bakushin O-chan!

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
Let's head over to the gym and go for a run right now! 
Bakushin, bakushiiiin! Haha ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, yes!! Let's dash right there! 
To the gym! Bakushin, bakushin, bakushiiiiiiiiiiiin!
